violations.text: The establishment was lacking chlorine for sanitizing of the 3 bay sink.PIC purchased during inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2025
Inspector observed live mouse. PIC removed from premises. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2025

(1 Dr Reach In ) located in the (kitchen ) area was not in good repair. Ambient temperature observed at 51df.Establishment not allowed to store any TCS products in unit until repaired and/or replaced. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2025

The floors throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2025
Establishment is lacking chlorine for sanitizing for 3 bay sink. PIC purchased chlorine during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2025

( Prepackaged chopped spinach ) was observed held at (60 ) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC voluntarily disposed of product. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2025

The presence of (rodents ) is not controlled as evidenced by (droppings throughout establishment ). The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2025

The cutting boards in the (kitchen ) are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2025

(1 Dr Reach In) located in the (kitchen) area was not in good repair.Ambient temperatures observed at 63DF. Establishment not allowed to store any TCS foods in unit until repaired and/or replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2025
The following non-food contact surfaces of the debris: 1.hot hold unit 2.prep table shelves 3.all refrigeration units 4.dough mixer 5.drawers near cash register New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025
The back outside refuse areas have an accumulation, of trash, litter, and other debris New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the (kitchen and back storage area ) area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2025

The floors throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue, food debris, and/or droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2025

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. PIC provided soap during inspection. The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by two buckets. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Employee relocated buckets. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/11/2024

Food contact surfaces of the following equipment/utensils were observed with an accumulation of food and debris: -Slicer -Can opener -stand mixer. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 01/11/2024

The cutting boards on the prep unit are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 01/25/2024

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. PIC obtained strips during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/25/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving under the grill and pizza oven, side of pizza oven, shelves of refrigeration units, and prep unit under the hood have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 01/25/2024
The refuse area has an accumulation of rubbish and debris, the area around the grease receptacle has an accumulation of grease. New Violation. Correct By: 01/25/2024
